subject: Any idea to make RTX 3090 works properly?
body:
Dear All,
Hi, we recently bought a workstation with 4x RTX3090, 384G RAM and 2x intel 
xeon CPUs, we expect this thing to be running super fast but the 
preprocessing with boxnet tool enabled was disastrous, I'm wondering if 
anyone have discovered a way to make the RTX 30 series working properly?

Thank you very much in advance!
Yours sincerely,
Linhua Tai
